BNN_Model module

class src.model.BNN_Model.FlexibleSimpleNN(hidden_layers: Sequence[int] = (50, ), output_size: int = 1, activation: <built-in function callable> = <jax._src.custom_derivatives.custom_jvp object at 0x134c4e3b0>, kernel_init: <built-in function callable> = <function variance_scaling.<locals>.init at 0x1351abb50>, bias_init: <built-in function callable> = <function zeros at 0x134c40b80>, use_for_regression: bool = False, parent: Union[flax.linen.module.Module, flax.core.scope.Scope, flax.linen.module._Sentinel, NoneType] = <flax.linen.module._Sentinel object at 0x134d49ae0>, name: Optional[str] = None)

Bases: Module

activation: callable = <jax._src.custom_derivatives.custom_jvp object>
bias_init(shape: ~collections.abc.Sequence[int | ~typing.Any], dtype: ~typing.Any = <class 'jax.numpy.float64'>) → Array

An initializer that returns a constant array full of zeros.

The key argument is ignored.

>>> import jax, jax.numpy as jnp
>>> jax.nn.initializers.zeros(jax.random.key(42), (2, 3), jnp.float32)
Array([[0., 0., 0.],
       [0., 0., 0.]], dtype=float32)
